description: Prosodic mode honoring Cherokee (Tsalagi) oratory tradition. Cherokee oral culture carries law, history, and identity through spoken word — delivery is steady and even, treating each statement as a complete unit. The Cherokee syllabary tradition emphasizes clarity of each syllable. This mode reflects that precision: even cadence, no rush, clear structural emphasis at knowledge-bearing points.
intended_use: Preservation of Cherokee (Tsalagi) oratory prosodic patterns
Cultural voice interfaces honoring Southeastern Indigenous communication
